flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Niagara County Community College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($10.9k → $12.0k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Niagara County Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Niagara County Community College rose 13% between 2006 and 2009 (23.4% → 26.5%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Niagara County Community College rose 11% between 2021 and 2024 (57.2% → 63.7%).
